## Contract

**Delegator use only.** This registry is an index, not a summary. Any agent that launches subagents reads it to select relevant skills, then passes exact `SKILL.md` paths for the subagent to read before work.

`SKILL.md` remains the source of truth. Do not inject generated summaries or compact rules by default; pass paths so subagents load the full runtime contract and preserve author intent.

## Project Context

- **Project**: zanovix.com
- **Stack**: Astro 6 SSR + React islands (@astrojs/react) + Tailwind 4 (@tailwindcss/vite, tokens in `src/styles/global.css` via `@theme`) + GSAP + Lenis
- **Fonts**: @fontsource-variable/hanken-grotesk, @fontsource-variable/cormorant-garamond, @fontsource-variable/newsreader, @fontsource-variable/inter, @fontsource/jetbrains-mono (self-hosted)
- **Package manager**: npm
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Artifact language**: castellano peninsular, trato de "tú", sin voseo, sin guiones largos (—)
- **Voice**: anti-hype. Sin "transformación digital / disruptivo / 10x / agencia / consultora"
- **Design sources of truth**: PRODUCT.md, DESIGN.md (parcialmente obsoleto — en revisión), docs/estrategia/01-estrategia-mensaje.md

## Loading protocol

1. Match task context and target files against the `Trigger / description` column.
2. Pass only the matching `Path` values to the subagent under `## Skills to load before work`.
3. Instruct the subagent to read those exact `SKILL.md` files before reading, writing, reviewing, testing, or creating artifacts.
4. For any UI/design/frontend task on this project, ALWAYS include `impeccable` skill path.
5. If no matching skill exists, proceed without project skill injection and report `skill_resolution: none`.
